topics.title: Travis Scott Was 'Actually Nervous' Filming His Scenes For Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey'

sources.headline: Travis Scott Was ‘Actually Nervous’ When He Shot His Scenes For ‘The Odyssey’
sources.summary: Scott was out of his comfort zone, as every star in Chris Nolan's star-heavy project watched on as he delivered his lines.

topics.title: Elon Musk Says Grok Will Make Feature-Length, AI-Generated and Historically Accurate The Odyssey Movie Before the Year Ends
topics.angle: Elon Musk announced that his AI, Grok, will create a feature-length, historically accurate AI-generated film of 'The Odyssey' by year's end.

sources.headline: Elon Musk Says Grok Will Make Feature-Length, AI-Generated and Historically Accurate The Odyssey Movie Before the Year Ends
sources.summary: But for all of the outrage Musk has drummed up around 'The Odyssey' — particularly over the casting of Lupita Nyong'o and Elliot Page — the film has not notably suffered at the box office at all.

topics.title: 'Pumping Iron' Author Charles Gaines Dies at 84
topics.angle: Charles Gaines, the author of 'Pumping Iron' which helped launch Arnold Schwarzenegger's career, has passed away at 84.

sources.headline: Charles Gaines Dies: ‘Pumping Iron’ Author Who Helped Launch Arnold Schwarzenegger Was 84
sources.summary: Charles Gaines, whose 1970s book and documentary Pumping Iron helped launch Arnold Schwarzenegger’s career, died July 21. He was 84.
